lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਿਮਰੀਐ ਤਿਸੁ ਦੇਹੀ ਕਉ ਪਾਲਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak so prabh simareeai tis dehee kau paal |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, meditate in remembrance on God, and nurture this body. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟਿ ਵਸਹਿ ਚਰਣਾਰਬਿੰਦ ਰਸਨਾ ਜਪੈ ਗੁਪਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: ghatt vaseh charanaarabind rasanaa japai gupaal |
lines.english: Let the Lotus Feet of the Lord abide within your heart, and with your tongue, chant God's Name.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਅਠਸਠਿ ਤੀਰਥ ਕਰਤਾ ਆਪਿ ਕਰੇ ਇਸਨਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape atthasatth teerath karataa aap kare isanaan |
lines.english: The Creator Himself is the sixty-eight sacred places of pilgrimage; He Himself takes the cleansing bath in them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸੰਜਮਿ ਵਰਤੈ ਸ੍ਵਾਮੀ ਆਪਿ ਜਪਾਇਹਿ ਨਾਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape sanjam varatai svaamee aap japaaeihi naam |
lines.english: He Himself practices austere self-discipline; the Lord Master Himself causes us to chant His Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਹੋਇ ਭਉ ਖੰਡਨੁ ਆਪਿ ਕਰੈ ਸਭੁ ਦਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: aap deaal hoe bhau khanddan aap karai sabh daan |
lines.english: He Himself becomes merciful to us; the Destroyer of fear Himself gives in charity to all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਆਪਿ ਬੁਝਾਏ ਸੋ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਦਰਗਹਿ ਪਾਏ ਮਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: jis no guramukh aap bujhaae so sad hee darageh paae maan |
lines.english: One whom He has enlightened and made Gurmukh, ever obtains honor in His Court.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਦੀ ਪੈਜ ਰਖੈ ਹਰਿ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਸੋ ਸਚਾ ਹਰਿ ਜਾਨੁ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: jis dee paij rakhai har suaamee so sachaa har jaan |14|
lines.english: One whose honor the Lord Master has preserved, comes to know the True Lord. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੈ ਸਿਉ ਚਿਤੁ ਨ ਲਾਵਈ ਜਿਤੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabadai siau chit na laavee jit sukh vasai man aae |
lines.english: It does not focus its consciousness on the Word of the Shabad, which would bring peace to abide in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭੇਟੇ ਜਗੁ ਅੰਧੁ ਹੈ ਅੰਧੇ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak bin satigur bhette jag andh hai andhe karam kamaae |
lines.english: O Nanak, without meeting the True Guru, the world is blind, and it does blind deeds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾਮਸਿ ਲਗਾ ਸਦਾ ਫਿਰੈ ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਜਲਤੁ ਬਿਹਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: taamas lagaa sadaa firai ahinis jalat bihaae |
lines.english: Always afflicted with the dark passions of low energy, it wanders around, passing its days and nights burning.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਫੁਰਮਾਇਆ ਕਾਰੀ ਏਹ ਕਰੇਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: satiguroo furamaaeaa kaaree eeh karehu |
lines.english: The True Guru has commanded us to do this:

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੂ ਦੁਆਰੈ ਹੋਇ ਕੈ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸੰਮਾਲੇਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: guroo duaarai hoe kai saahib samaalehu |
lines.english: through the Guru's Gate, meditate on the Lord Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਥੀਐ ਕਹਣਾ ਕਿਛੂ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jo tis bhaavai so theeai kahanaa kichhoo na jaae |1|
lines.english: Whatever pleases Him, comes to pass; no one has any say in this. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸਦਾ ਹਜੂਰਿ ਹੈ ਭਰਮੈ ਕੇ ਛਉੜ ਕਟਿ ਕੈ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਧਰੇਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: saahib sadaa hajoor hai bharamai ke chhaurr katt kai antar jot dharehu |
lines.english: The Lord Master is ever-present. He tears away the veil of doubt, and installs His Light within the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਹੈ ਦਾਰੂ ਏਹੁ ਲਾਏਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam amrit hai daaroo ehu laaehu |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord is Ambrosial Nectar - take this healing medicine!

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਭਾਣਾ ਚਿਤਿ ਰਖਹੁ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਸਚਾ ਨੇਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: satigur kaa bhaanaa chit rakhahu sanjam sachaa nehu |
lines.english: Enshrine the Will of the True Guru in your consciousness, and make the True Lord's Love your self-discipline.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਐਥੈ ਸੁਖੈ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਰਖਸੀ ਅਗੈ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਕੇਲ ਕਰੇਹੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak aithai sukhai andar rakhasee agai har siau kel karehu |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, you shall be kept in peace here, and hereafter, you shall celebrate with the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਭਾਰ ਅਠਾਰਹ ਬਣਸਪਤਿ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਫਲ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: aape bhaar atthaarah banasapat aape hee fal laae |
lines.english: He Himself is the vast variety of Nature, and He Himself makes it bear fruit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਰਤਾ ਆਪੇ ਭੁਗਤਾ ਆਪੇ ਦੇਇ ਦਿਵਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: aape karataa aape bhugataa aape dee divaae |
lines.english: He Himself is the Creator, and He Himself is the Enjoyer; He Himself gives, and causes others to give.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਮਾਲੀ ਆਪਿ ਸਭੁ ਸਿੰਚੈ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਮੁਹਿ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: aape maalee aap sabh sinchai aape hee muhi paae |
lines.english: He Himself is the Gardener, He Himself irrigates all the plants, and He Himself puts them in His mouth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਆਪੇ ਹੈ ਰਾਖਾ ਆਪੇ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: aape saahib aape hai raakhaa aape rahiaa samaae |
lines.english: He Himself is the Lord and Master, and He Himself is the Protector; He Himself is permeating and pervading everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਆਖੈ ਹਰਿ ਕਰਤੇ ਕੀ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਤਿਲੁ ਨ ਤਮਾਏ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: jan naanak vaddiaaee aakhai har karate kee jis no til na tamaae |15|
lines.english: Servant Nanak speaks of the greatness of the Lord, the Creator, who has no greed at all. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਣਸੁ ਭਰਿਆ ਆਣਿਆ ਮਾਣਸੁ ਭਰਿਆ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: maanas bhariaa aaniaa maanas bhariaa aae |
lines.english: One person brings a full bottle, and another fills his cup.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣਾ ਪਰਾਇਆ ਨ ਪਛਾਣਈ ਖਸਮਹੁ ਧਕੇ ਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aapanaa paraaeaa na pachhaanee khasamahu dhake khaae |
lines.english: he cannot distinguish between his own and others, and he is struck down by his Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਪੀਤੈ ਮਤਿ ਦੂਰਿ ਹੋਇ ਬਰਲੁ ਪਵੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: jit peetai mat door hoe baral pavai vich aae |
lines.english: Drinking the wine, his intelligence departs, and madness enters his mind;

lines.gurmukhi: ਝੂਠਾ ਮਦੁ ਮੂਲਿ ਨ ਪੀਚਈ ਜੇ ਕਾ ਪਾਰਿ ਵਸਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jhootthaa mad mool na peechee je kaa paar vasaae |
lines.english: Do not drink the false wine at all, if it is in your power.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਪੀਤੈ ਖਸਮੁ ਵਿਸਰੈ ਦਰਗਹ ਮਿਲੈ ਸਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jit peetai khasam visarai daragah milai sajaae |
lines.english: Drinking it, he forgets his Lord and Master, and he is punished in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਕੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਹੈ ਮਹਲੀ ਪਾਵੈ ਥਾਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sadaa saahib kai rang rahai mahalee paavai thaau |1|
lines.english: He shall dwell forever in the Love of the Lord Master, and obtain a seat in the Mansion of His Presence. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਦਰੀ ਸਚੁ ਮਦੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਜਿਸੁ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak nadaree sach mad paaeeai satigur milai jis aae |
lines.english: O Nanak, the True Guru comes and meets the mortal; by His Grace, one obtains the True Wine.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਤਿਨੑਿ ਸਵਾਲਿਆ ਤਾਂ ਸਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਜਗਾਏ ਤਾਂ ਸੁਧਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jaa tina savaaliaa taan sav rahiaa jagaae taan sudh hoe |
lines.english: When the Lord puts him to sleep, he remains asleep; when He wakes him up, he regains consciousness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਜਗਤੁ ਜੀਵਤੁ ਮਰੈ ਜਾ ਇਸ ਨੋ ਸੋਝੀ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: eihu jagat jeevat marai jaa is no sojhee hoe |
lines.english: When this world comes to understand, it remains dead while yet alive.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਜੀਵਤੁ ਮਰੈ ਤਾ ਫਿਰਿ ਮਰਣੁ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur prasaad jeevat marai taa fir maran na hoe |2|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, remain dead while yet alive, and you shall not have to die again. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਜੇ ਆਪਣੀ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮੇਲੈ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak nadar kare je aapanee satigur melai soe |
lines.english: O Nanak, when the Lord casts His Glance of Grace, He causes him to meet the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਦਾ ਕੀਤਾ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਤਿਸ ਨੋ ਪਰਵਾਹ ਨਾਹੀ ਕਿਸੈ ਕੇਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: jis daa keetaa sabh kichh hovai tis no paravaah naahee kisai keree |
lines.english: By His doing, everything happens; what does He care for anyone else?

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਤੇਰਾ ਦਿਤਾ ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਖਾਵੈ ਸਭ ਮੁਹਤਾਜੀ ਕਢੈ ਤੇਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo teraa ditaa sabh ko khaavai sabh muhataajee kadtai teree |
lines.english: O Dear Lord, everyone eats whatever You give - all are subservient to You.
